test_cases.description: Three or more correlation rules with the same name should trigger duplicate_rule_names error, not just exactly two duplicates
test_cases.input_description: Config with three rules all sharing the same name 'rule-alpha'
assertions: ConfigError is raised
error relates to duplicate rule names

test_cases.description: Port conflict detection: two sources on the same bind_address and port should be rejected
test_cases.input_description: Two webhook sources both binding to 0.0.0.0:8080
assertions: ConfigError is raised for port conflict on same bind_address

test_cases.description: NoteworthinessThreshold must reject values slightly above 1.0 (e.g., 1.01)
assertions: ConfigError is raised for threshold above 1.0

test_cases.description: NoteworthinessThreshold must reject values slightly below 0.0 (e.g., -0.01)
assertions: ConfigError is raised for negative threshold

test_cases.description: bind_address at maximum length 253 should be accepted; length 254 should be rejected
test_cases.input_description: Webhook source with bind_address of exactly 253 chars, and separately 254 chars
assertions: 253-char bind_address is accepted
254-char bind_address raises ConfigError

test_cases.description: CorrelationRuleConfig name at exactly 128 characters should be accepted
test_cases.input_description: Rule with name of exactly 128 alphanumeric characters
assertions: 128-char name is accepted and present in returned config

test_cases.description: MatchCondition pattern must not accept empty string (min length 1)
test_cases.input_description: Match condition with empty pattern string
assertions: ConfigError raised for empty pattern

test_cases.description: CorrelationRuleConfig group_by must have at least one element (min length 1)
assertions: ConfigError raised for empty group_by

test_cases.description: Multiple invalid regex patterns across different rules should all be caught
test_cases.input_description: Two rules each with an is_regex=true match condition containing invalid regex patterns like '[unclosed' and '(?P<bad'
assertions: ConfigError is raised for invalid regex

test_cases.description: DiskSinkConfig should reject empty output_dir string
assertions: ConfigError raised for empty output_dir

test_cases.description: ApprenticeSinkConfig should reject URLs not matching ^https?://.+ pattern, such as 'ftp://example.com'
assertions: ConfigError raised for non-http(s) URL in apprentice sink

test_cases.description: KindexSinkConfig should reject URLs not matching ^https?://.+ pattern
assertions: ConfigError raised for invalid kindex sink URL

test_cases.description: OtlpSourceConfig should reject port=0 and port=65536 just like WebhookSourceConfig
assertions: ConfigError raised for OTLP port below minimum

test_cases.description: SentinelSourceConfig should reject port=0 and empty bind_address
assertions: ConfigError raised for sentinel port below minimum

test_cases.description: FileSourceConfig should reject empty path string (min length 1)
assertions: ConfigError raised for empty file source path

test_cases.description: Config with only file and sentinel sources (no webhook/otlp) should validate correctly to ensure all union branches work independently
test_cases.input_description: Config with one file source and one sentinel source, disk sink, one rule
assertions: Config validates successfully
sources list has 2 elements of correct types

test_cases.description: Kindex config with null/missing kindex section but no kindex sink should still validate successfully
test_cases.input_description: Config with kindex field explicitly set to None/null and only disk sink
assertions: Config validates successfully without kindex section when no kindex sink present

test_cases.description: WebhookSourceConfig path with just '/' should be accepted (regex ^/.*)
assertions: Path '/' is accepted as valid

test_cases.description: Returned config preserves exact values for uncommon but valid field values, not just typical test values
test_cases.input_description: Config with max_open_stories=42, story_timeout_seconds=999, unusual but valid field values
assertions: max_open_stories equals 42
story_timeout_seconds equals 999

test_cases.description: Kindex config with noteworthiness_threshold=0.5 and non-empty event_type_filters and tag_patterns should be accessible on the returned config
test_cases.input_description: Full config with kindex section containing threshold=0.5, event_type_filters=['alert','incident'], tag_patterns=['security.*']
assertions: kindex.noteworthiness_threshold equals 0.5
kindex.event_type_filters has 2 items
kindex.tag_patterns has 1 item

test_cases.description: CorrelationRuleConfig name with dots and hyphens should be accepted (regex ^[a-zA-Z0-9_.-]+$)
assertions: Name with dots, hyphens, and underscores is accepted

test_cases.description: CorrelationRuleConfig name with spaces should be rejected by the regex ^[a-zA-Z0-9_.-]+$
assertions: ConfigError raised for name containing spaces

test_cases.description: Passing a non-dict (e.g., a list) to validate_config_dict should raise an appropriate error
assertions: ConfigError or TypeError raised for non-dict input

test_cases.description: Config with a complex regex pattern in match_condition (is_regex=true) that is valid should pass, e.g., lookahead
test_cases.input_description: Match condition with is_regex=true and pattern='(?=.*error)(?=.*critical).*'
assertions: Complex but valid regex pattern is accepted

test_cases.description: StigmergySinkConfig should accept both http and https URLs
test_cases.input_description: Config with one stigmergy sink using http:// and another using https://
assertions: Both http and https URLs are accepted for stigmergy sink

test_cases.description: FileSourceConfig poll_interval_seconds just below 0.1 (e.g., 0.09) should be rejected
assertions: ConfigError raised for poll_interval just below minimum

test_cases.description: Multiple match conditions in a single rule should all be validated, including regex checks
test_cases.input_description: Rule with two match_conditions: first is valid (is_regex=false), second has is_regex=true with invalid regex '*invalid'
assertions: ConfigError raised even when invalid regex is not the first match condition

test_cases.description: The source_label parameter should be included or referenced in error context for validate_config_dict errors
assertions: ConfigError is raised
source_label context may be included in error

test_cases.description: Frozen model invariant: nested config objects (sources, sinks, rules, kindex) should also be immutable
test_cases.input_description: Valid config; attempt to mutate a nested source object's port
assertions: Attempting to set attribute on nested source raises TypeError or similar

test_cases.description: YAML that parses to a scalar (e.g., just a string 'hello') should raise validation_error or empty_config, not crash
test_cases.input_description: YAML file containing just the string 'hello'
assertions: ConfigError is raised, not an unhandled exception

test_cases.description: YAML that parses to a list should raise validation_error, not crash
assertions: ConfigError is raised for non-dict YAML root

test_cases.description: OtlpSourceConfig should accept boundary port values 1 and 65535, same as WebhookSourceConfig
test_cases.input_description: OTLP source with port=1 and separately port=65535
assertions: Port 1 is accepted for OTLP
Port 65535 is accepted for OTLP

test_cases.description: SentinelSourceConfig should accept boundary port values and valid bind_address
assertions: Sentinel source with port=1 is accepted

test_cases.description: MatchCondition field at exactly 1 character should be accepted (min length 1)
assertions: Single character field name is accepted

test_cases.description: Config with many rules (e.g., 10+) with unique names should validate; checks that uniqueness check works at scale, not just for 2
test_cases.input_description: Config with 10 rules, each with a distinct name like rule-1 through rule-10
assertions: All 10 rules validate successfully
rules list has 10 elements

test_cases.description: WebhookSourceConfig path with deep nesting like '/api/v2/events/webhook' should be accepted
assertions: Deep nested path is accepted

test_cases.description: CorrelationRuleConfig name with only a single character should be accepted (min length 1, valid regex char)
assertions: Single character name is accepted

test_cases.description: SentinelSourceConfig with empty bind_address should be rejected
assertions: ConfigError raised for empty sentinel bind_address

test_cases.description: OtlpSourceConfig with empty bind_address should be rejected
assertions: ConfigError raised for empty OTLP bind_address

test_cases.description: Port conflict: webhook and sentinel sources on same bind_address and same port should be detected
test_cases.input_description: Webhook source on 0.0.0.0:8080 and sentinel source on 0.0.0.0:8080
assertions: ConfigError raised for port conflict across different source types on same address
